behavior_in_task_description.reason: Instruction names all files, methods (simple_deserialize in MoveValue/MoveStruct/MoveVariant), and the AResult import to remove.

no_solution_leakage.reason: Instruction describes what to remove but doesn't show replacement code or line-by-line fixes.

solution_uniqueness_guard.reason: Tests check for absence of 'pub fn simple_deserialize' within impl blocks and successful compilation, which any correct removal would satisfy.

tests_verify_behavior_not_text.reason: Tests run cargo check, build, clippy, and test via subprocess in addition to text checks.

test_not_tautological.reason: Tests verify actual removal and crate compilation; a stub cannot satisfy cargo build/test.

behavior_in_tests.reason: Instruction's verification commands (check, check --tests, clippy, test --lib, build) all map to test functions.

informative_test_structure.reason: Tests are named descriptively per method/file and have docstrings indicating f2p/p2p.

no_typos.reason: File paths and command names are correct.

instruction_no_hint_leakage.reason: Instruction necessarily names the methods/files to remove, which is the task scope, not leakage.
